<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Dengue dashboard Bangladesh</title>

    <!-- Plotly for chart -->
    <script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-latest.min.js"></script>

    <!-- SheetJS for reading Excel -->
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>

    <style>
        body {
            font-family: Arial;
            margin: 20px;
            background: #f5f5f5;
        }

        h2 {
            color: #333;
        }

        #controls {
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            padding: 10px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }

        select {
            margin-right: 15px;
            padding: 5px;
        }

        #chart {
            background: white;
            padding: 10px;
            border-radius: 8px;
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

<h2>Dengue monthly cases dashboard</h2>

<div id="controls">
    District:
    <select id="districtSelect"></select>

    Year:
    <select id="yearSelect">
        <option value="All">All</option>
    </select>
</div>

<div id="chart"></div>

<script>
let fullData = [];

// Read Excel file safely
async function loadExcel() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch("ABSDengueDataBD.xlsx");
        const arrayBuffer = await response.arrayBuffer();

        const workbook = XLSX.read(arrayBuffer, { type: "array" });

        // Check if sheet exists
        const sheetName = "data22";
        if (!workbook.Sheets[sheetName]) {
            alert(`Sheet "${sheetName}" not found!`);
            return;
        }

        const sheet = workbook.Sheets[sheetName];
        const jsonData = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json(sheet, { defval: null });

        fullData = jsonData.map(d => ({
            District: d.District || "Unknown",
            Month: d.Month || "Unknown",
            Month1: Number(d.Month1) || 0,
            Year: Number(d.Year) || 0,
            Cases: Number(d.Monthly_cases) || 0
        }));

        initControls();
        plotData();
    } catch (err) {
        console.error(err);
        alert("Error loading Excel file. Make sure it exists and column names match exactly.");
    }
}

// Unique values
function getUnique(data, key) {
    return [...new Set(data.map(d => d[key]))];
}

// Populate dropdown
function populateDropdown(id, values) {
    const select = document.getElementById(id);
    select.innerHTML = ""; // Clear previous options

    values.forEach(v => {
        const opt = document.createElement("option");
        opt.value = v;
        opt.text = v;
        select.appendChild(opt);
    });
}

// Initialize controls
function initControls() {
    const districts = getUnique(fullData, "District").sort();
    const years = getUnique(fullData, "Year").sort();

    populateDropdown("districtSelect", districts);
    populateDropdown("yearSelect", ["All", ...years]);

    document.getElementById("districtSelect").value = districts[0];

    document.getElementById("districtSelect").addEventListener("change", plotData);
    document.getElementById("yearSelect").addEventListener("change", plotData);
}

// Plot function
function plotData() {
    const district = document.getElementById("districtSelect").value;
    const year = document.getElementById("yearSelect").value;

    let filtered = fullData.filter(d => d.District === district);

    if (year !== "All") {
        filtered = filtered.filter(d => d.Year == year);
    }

    filtered.sort((a, b) => a.Year - b.Year || a.Month1 - b.Month1);

    const x = filtered.map(d => `${d.Month}-${d.Year}`);
    const y = filtered.map(d => d.Cases);

    const trace = {
        x: x,
        y: y,
        mode: "lines+markers",
        type: "scatter",
        name: "Cases",
        line: { color: "#FF4136" },
        marker: { size: 6 }
    };

    const layout = {
        title: `Dengue cases in ${district}`,
        xaxis: { title: "Month-Year", tickangle: -45 },
        yaxis: { title: "Monthly cases" },
        margin: { t: 50, b: 100 }
    };

    Plotly.newPlot("chart", [trace], layout, {responsive: true});
}

// Start
loadExcel();
</script>

</body>
</html>
